name: {REPLACE: short name for the image, ~50 chars}
caption: {REPLACE: visible caption or descriptive sentence}
description: {REPLACE: longer description, ~155 chars — match the page's alt-text intent}
width: {REPLACE: intrinsic width in pixels, as Number, e.g. 1200}
height: {REPLACE: intrinsic height in pixels, as Number, e.g. 800}

copyrightHolder.name: {REPLACE: copyright holder, often same as creator}

creditText: {REPLACE: how the image should be credited when used, e.g. Photo by Brand Name}
license: {REPLACE: URL to license page, e.g. https://example.com/licensing}
acquireLicensePage: {REPLACE: URL where users can buy/license the image, e.g. https://example.com/licensing#buy}
